---
title: "Gate"
format: html
engine: julia
execute:
  daemon: false
julia:
  exeflags: ["--project=@."]
---

# Gate

```{python}
from qiskit import QuantumCircuit
import numpy as np
circ = QuantumCircuit(1, 1)
circ.h([0]) # h gate
circ.x([0]) # x gate
circ.ry(np.pi/2, 0) # R_x gate, 0 is the position of this gate. 
circ.measure([0], [0])
circ.draw()
```
